summary: Excellent audience recording of a solid 1985 show with a strong setlist and top‑form playing throughout.
review: Reviewers praise the concert’s setlist and note that everything was performed at peak form, calling this one of the best‑sounding audience recordings they’ve heard. The audio quality is described as crystal‑clear for an AUD source, easily outshining other copies of the same show. No specific song or performance criticisms were offered.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review rates both the musical performance and recording highly; weighted averaging (70% show, 30% audio) yields a ~4.3‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it one of the best‑quality AUDs they’ve heard, noting clear, balanced sound that beats other copies.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall strong setlist with all songs played at top form; no specific sequence issues mentioned.
